Tests that the reciprocal of the tangent of positive zero is Infinity.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the `Math.tan` function in JavaScript. It verifies that the tangent of positive zero (`+0`) results in a division by zero, which should return `Infinity`. This test ensures that the `Math.tan` function conforms to expected mathematical behavior when handling edge cases involving zero. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on validating a single mathematical operation.
